semantic: calls filter.IsEmpty and filter.Match in filteredSummaries; calls filter.FilterLabel in View
data_flow: SourceFilter → bool predicate applied to each SummaryItem

semantic: creates and embeds filterOverlayModel; forwards key messages to it when overlay is active; receives filterOverlayConfirmMsg and filterOverlayCancelMsg from it
receives summariesLoadedMsg; emits loadSummariesMsg on date navigation; uses SummaryItem and ChannelItem types
uses dateStyle, helpDescStyle, expandedArrowStyle, collapsedArrowStyle, selectedCardStyle, sourceTypeBadgeStyle, summaryTextStyle, cardCountStyle
matches Left, Right, Up, Down, Toggle, ExpandAll, CollapseAll, Filter, FilterPicker key bindings
